'''Nazrita Villache''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] woman and chief mechanic for the [[Klatooinian Trade Guild/Legends|Klatooinian Trade Guild]] syndicate on [[Boztrok]]. She gave [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] a tour of her first [[Starship/Legends|ship]], the ''[[Brentaal Princess]]''. Villache had maintained the ship for the Guild and had installed a [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] tube in the ship for extra firepower.<ref name="psg" />

She reported to [[Pok Nar-Ten]] and would often install modification at his direction on unsuspecting smuggler's ships. She charged standard rates for repairs, although she was only supposed to charge 75% due to her use of the Klatooinian Trade Guild facilities. She would also occasionally be sent to repossess a ship back from a smuggler who had reneged on a deal.<ref name="AJ11" />
